title: Planning Surface Review
goal: Check whether `TODO.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, and archived execplans still form a coherent execution contract after the recent skill-system follow-through.
non_goals: Do not activate new work from this review alone.
Do not re-review individual archived execplan content beyond queue integrity.

review_mode.review question: Are the planning surfaces coherent and idle rather than silently retaining stale active-work residue?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: `TODO.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, archived execplans from the latest tranche, planning-surface checks

recommendation.dismiss: planning-surface coherence concerns in this scope

drift_log: 2026-04-09: Review created as part of the full review-matrix pass.
